description.ko: 고대의 구조물들이 VOID-3 구역의 어두운 중심부에 떠 있는, 우주의 고요하고 영원한 심연으로의 여정입니다.
description.en: A journey into the silent, eternal depths of the universe where ancient structures remain suspended in the dark heart of the VOID-3 sector.

prompt: VOID-3 cosmic deep, a massive monolithic structure floating in the infinite dark abyss of space, surrounded by swirling iridescent nebulae and distant dying stars, cinematic lighting, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution, ethereal atmosphere, silent vacuum aesthetic
